name: assaf
description: Assaf Tzur-El's personal collection of Agent Skills (the open SKILL.md standard), each cataloged as an individually installable plugin.

plugins.name: hebrew-md-to-docx
plugins.description: Convert Hebrew or mixed Hebrew/English Markdown into a properly formatted, RTL-aware Word .docx.

plugins.name: hebrew-md-to-pptx
plugins.description: Convert Hebrew or mixed Hebrew/English slide-Markdown into an RTL-aware PowerPoint .pptx skeleton.

plugins.name: pptx-to-slide-md
plugins.description: Extract an existing PowerPoint .pptx back into slide-structured Markdown; inverse of hebrew-md-to-pptx, so a deck can round-trip.
